title: OJS Encryption Extension
description: Schema for OJS client-side encryption using the codec pipeline. Defines the encoded payload structure, codec metadata, and encryption parameters for AES-256-GCM encryption of job args.

codecMetadata.title: Codec Metadata
codecMetadata.description: Metadata fields stored in the job's meta object to describe applied encodings.

ojs.codec.encodings.title: Applied Encodings
ojs.codec.encodings.description: Ordered array of encoding names applied to the job args. Decoders MUST reverse the encodings in reverse order.

ojs.codec.key_id.title: Encryption Key ID
ojs.codec.key_id.description: Identifier of the encryption key used. MUST be present when any encoding involves encryption.

encodedPayload.title: Encoded Payload
encodedPayload.description: Structure of an encoded (encrypted/compressed) job args payload.

ojs_encoded.title: Encoded Marker
ojs_encoded.description: Marker field indicating this is an encoded payload. MUST be true.

encoding.title: Encoding Name
encoding.description: The encoding applied to produce this payload.

data.title: Encoded Data
data.description: Base64-encoded bytes of the encrypted/compressed payload.

encryptionParameters.title: Encryption Parameters
encryptionParameters.description: Parameters for AES-256-GCM encryption used by the OJS codec pipeline.

key_size_bits.title: Key Size (bits)
key_size_bits.description: Size of the encryption key in bits.

nonce_size_bytes.title: Nonce Size (bytes)
nonce_size_bytes.description: Size of the random nonce in bytes. MUST be 12 for AES-256-GCM.

tag_size_bytes.title: Authentication Tag Size (bytes)
tag_size_bytes.description: Size of the GCM authentication tag in bytes.
